message:
feat(store,runtime,server,command): real run_id, process_id, tcp_port in INFO

- Generate unique 40-char hex run_id at startup using LCG seeded with PID
- Report real process_id via std::process::id()
- Report configured tcp_port via Runtime::set_server_port()
- Add server_run_id, server_pid, server_port fields to Store
- Update INFO server section to use real values instead of hardcoded zeros
- Mark info_server_section and info_clients_section as any_bulk in
  conformance fixtures (values are now dynamic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
